name_cn:
Name: Fendi 3-Piece Wallet
Quality: Original single quality
Model: 8841
Color: Mocha Coffee Black Embossed
Size: 21.5CM×13CM×3CM
【FENDI】Fendi 2020 latest geometric flip-top mini bag, hardware accessories feature Fendi logo. Features a snap closure with two detachable interior pockets — one with a zipper, one with 8 card slots. Removable chain shoulder strap. Interior features a flat pocket. Brown leather material, black hand-painted embossed FF print. One pocket is made of the same material, the other is black leather. Gold metal hardware
